name: Kari Mehta
quote:
Sonam Wangchuk – a Ramon Magsaysay Award winner and one of India's most respected educators – is on the 17th day of his hunger strike.

He has reportedly lost over 8.5 kg, and his health continues to deteriorate.

When someone like him has to risk his life just to be heard, the silence is deafening.

The Government of India must open a dialogue. No democracy is weakened by dialogue. It is strengthened by it!
